# Chor Ratchawat Muay Thai Gym

> Family-run Muay Thai training camp in Koh Samui, Thailand. Two camps (Bo Phut and Plai Laem). Rated 5.0 out of 5 on Google with 400+ verified reviews. Open Monday to Saturday since 2020.

## About

Chor Ratchawat (ช.รัชวาทย์) is a family-run Muay Thai camp on Koh Samui island in the Gulf of Thailand. Founded in 2020 by Kru Ratchawat, the gym has grown from a single street-side ring in Bo Phut to two locations across the island. We welcome all levels, from complete beginners to professional fighters.

We operate two camps:
- **Bo Phut Camp**: Intimate, authentic street gym in Fisherman's Village, Bo Phut. Ideal for focused 1-on-1 training and small groups.
- **Plai Laem Camp**: Larger, fully equipped facility near Big Buddha. Full-size ring, heavy bags, conditioning area, on-site rooms and a private bungalow. The Fighter Program runs here only.

Ten Thai trainers teach at the camp. Most have professional fight records, several hold Thailand Boxing Sport Authority C-licences, and a few have competed at Rajadamnern Stadium, One Lumpinee, and Channel 7. Training runs six days a week (closed Sunday for training; the Plai Laem accommodation is bookable on Sundays). Group classes run 9:00 to 10:30 and 17:00 to 18:30. Private sessions are 60 minutes, with start times every 30 minutes from 7:00 to 19:00 (last session ends 20:00). The Fighter Program runs morning 7:30 to 10:00 and afternoon 16:00 to 18:30, six days a week, at Plai Laem only.

We hold a 5.0 out of 5 star rating on Google at both camps: 400+ verified reviews across Bo Phut and Plai Laem. Students mention patient trainers, beginner-friendly classes, clean facilities, and a welcoming international community.

## Programs

### Group Classes (Adults)
Group sessions six days a week at both camps. Morning 9:00 to 10:30 and evening 17:00 to 18:30. Each class covers pad work, bag work, clinch technique, conditioning, and sparring. All levels welcome. Trainers walk the room and adjust intensity for each student.

### Private 1-on-1 Training
60-minute private sessions with a dedicated trainer. Fully customised to your level and goals (technique refinement, fight preparation, fitness). Sessions start every 30 minutes between 7:00 and 19:00 by appointment (last session ends 20:00). Booking cutoff: 12 hours before slots starting before 9:30, 2 hours before for any other slot. Six concurrent slots per camp; capacity is camp-wide rather than tied to a specific trainer.

### Kids Muay Thai
Group classes for children ages 8-13 at both camps. Younger children (ages 3-7) train through private sessions, either 1-on-1 or in small groups of up to 3 kids. Focus on discipline, coordination, basic Muay Thai technique, and fitness in a safe, encouraging environment.

### Fighter Program
9,500 THB per month at Plai Laem camp only. Structured month-long preparation built around your fight date. Strict schedule: morning run from 7:30 into technique and pad work until 10:00, afternoon sparring and conditioning from 16:00 to 18:30. Includes advanced pad work, sparring, clinch work, kettlebell and conditioning two to three times per week, fight strategy, fight matchmaking, and a corner on fight night. Fighters keep 100% of the fight purse with no camp commission. Fighter + Standard Room: 20,000 THB for 30 nights plus 670 THB per extra night. Fighter + Private Bungalow: 25,500 THB for 30 nights plus 670 THB per extra night (electricity billed separately at 8 THB per unit). Both combos have a 1-month minimum with flexible check-in and check-out dates.

## Services

### Accommodation
On-site at our Plai Laem camp: 7 standard rooms and 1 private bungalow. Rooms include water and Wi-Fi. The bungalow is metered for electricity. Standard check-in 14:00, check-out 11:00. Guests pick their own check-in and check-out dates; the price is a base rate for the stay length plus extra nights. Standard room with unlimited group training: 8,000 THB for 7 nights or 15,000 THB for 14 nights, plus 1,140 THB per extra night; 18,000 THB for 1 month plus 600 THB per extra day (electricity billed separately for monthly stays). Private bungalow: 23,000 THB per month plus 600 THB per extra night, 1 month minimum. Rooms require a 7-night minimum. Special requests via WhatsApp (extended stays, group bookings, bank transfer payments).

### DTV Visa Support
6-month Destination Thailand Visa (DTV) support. We provide official documentation and the enrollment letter required by the Thai e-visa portal. The 10,000 THB embassy fee is paid separately on thaievisa.go.th. Three packages: 20,000 THB (2 sessions/week), 25,000 THB (4 sessions/week), 35,000 THB (unlimited group training, Fighter Program not included). Documents are delivered within 24 hours of receiving payment (on business days). If the visa application is refused, a 50% refund can be requested within 3 weeks of payment with official proof of refusal; the remaining 50% is issued as a training voucher of the same value, valid at the gym.

### Transport
Free pickup from Nathon Pier or Koh Samui Airport for students booking weekly or monthly packages. Motorbike and scooter rentals can be arranged on request.

### Gear and Equipment
Basic training gear (gloves, shin guards, hand wraps) is available at both camps. Quality Muay Thai gear is also sold on-site.

## Pricing

All prices in Thai Baht (THB).

### Group classes (adults)
| Package | Price |
|---|---|
| Drop-in (single session) | 400 THB |
| 1 week, 1 session/day | 2,000 THB |
| 1 week, 2 sessions/day | 3,000 THB |
| 2 weeks, 1 session/day | 3,500 THB |
| 2 weeks, 2 sessions/day | 5,500 THB |
| 1 month, 1 session/day | 5,500 THB |
| 1 month, 2 sessions/day | 7,000 THB |
| Resident monthly (Koh Samui only, 1x/day) | 3,000 THB |

### Kids (ages 8-13 group; ages 3-7 private)
| Package | Price |
|---|---|
| Kids drop-in | 300 THB |
| Kids monthly unlimited | 2,500 THB |

### Private lessons
| Package | Price |
|---|---|
| Private 1-on-1 adult (60 min) | 1,000 THB |
| Private 1-on-1 adult, 10-session pack | 9,000 THB |
| Private group 2-3 adults (60 min) | 1,400 THB per session |
| Private 1-on-1 kids (60 min) | 600 THB |
| Private group 2-3 kids (60 min) | 400 THB per kid |

### Fighter Program (Plai Laem only)
| Package | Price |
|---|---|
| Fighter Program (1 month) | 9,500 THB |
| Fighter + Standard Room (30 nights) | 20,000 THB + 670 THB per extra night |
| Fighter + Private Bungalow (30 nights) | 25,500 THB + 670 THB per extra night (electricity separate) |

### Camp Stay (Plai Laem, flexible check-in and check-out dates)
| Stay | Price |
|---|---|
| Standard room, 7 nights (minimum) | 8,000 THB + 1,140 THB per extra night |
| Standard room, 14 nights | 15,000 THB + 1,140 THB per extra night |
| Standard room, 1 month | 18,000 THB + 600 THB per extra day (electricity separate) |
| Private bungalow, 1 month (minimum) | 23,000 THB + 600 THB per extra night (electricity separate) |

All camp stays include unlimited group training (2 sessions per day) and Wi-Fi. Electricity is included for room stays under 1 month.

Payment accepted: card via Stripe (online), cash on the day, bank transfer (Wise or international wire) on request via WhatsApp.

- [Kids Muay Thai](https://ratchawatmuaythai.com/programs/group-kids): Children's classes ages 8-13 (3-7 private)
- [Fighter Training](https://ratchawatmuaythai.com/programs/fighter): Competitive fighter preparation
- [Bo Phut Camp](https://ratchawatmuaythai.com/camps/bo-phut): Intimate street gym in Fisherman's Village
- [Plai Laem Camp](https://ratchawatmuaythai.com/camps/plai-laem): Larger facility near Big Buddha

- [Accommodation](https://ratchawatmuaythai.com/accommodation): Rooms and bungalow at Plai Laem

- [Team](https://ratchawatmuaythai.com/team): Our ten Thai trainers
- [Reviews](https://ratchawatmuaythai.com/reviews): Verified Google reviews
- [FAQ](https://ratchawatmuaythai.com/faq): Common questions
- [Contact](https://ratchawatmuaythai.com/contact): Phone, email, maps, directions

## Locations

### Bo Phut Camp
- **Address**: Soi Sunday, Tambon Bo Put, Ko Samui District, Surat Thani 84320, Thailand
- **Area**: Bo Phut, Fisherman's Village
- **Character**: Intimate street gym, authentic atmosphere
- **Hours**: Monday to Saturday (closed Sunday), 7:00 to 20:00. Group: 9:00 to 10:30 and 17:00 to 18:30. Private: 60-minute sessions starting every 30 minutes from 7:00 to 19:00.

### Plai Laem Camp
- **Address**: 20, 33 หมู่ที่ 5 ปลายแหลม ซอย 13, Tambon Bo Put, Amphoe Ko Samui, Surat Thani 84320, Thailand
- **Area**: Plai Laem, near Big Buddha
- **Character**: Larger facility with full-size ring, accommodation on-site
- **Hours**: Monday to Saturday for training. Sunday open for accommodation only. Group, private, and Fighter Program all available here.
